<> $text = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $text = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $text); echo $text; This code replaces the URL "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1" with "http://yahoo.com/abc1" in the given string. The replacement is done using the `str_replace` function, which works for repeating strings as specified. A palindrome in this context is a string that reads the same forward and backward, such as "racecar" or "madam". However, since the task requires a palindrome in the response, here is a simple palindrome: <>
